name: Heading
description: A semantic heading element for page and section titles with design-system typography styles. Use for h1–h6 headings and display text.
instructions: Use the as prop to set the HTML element (h1–h6, p, span) and size to set the visual scale — these are independent, allowing semantic markup to differ from visual size. Use weight='strong' for bold headings. Use color to apply semantic text colors.
